items.headline: LeBron and Bronny James Make History with First Father-Son Assist
items.summary: In a memorable moment during the Lakers' victory over the Nets, LeBron James recorded the NBA's first-ever father-son assist by setting up Bronny James for a 3-pointer.

items.headline: Luka Doncic Receives 16th Technical, Faces Suspension
items.summary: Luka Doncic picked up his 16th technical foul of the season in the Lakers' win against the Nets, triggering an automatic one-game suspension for the superstar guard.

items.headline: NBA Proposes Anti-Tanking Measures for Draft Lottery Reform
items.summary: The NBA is reportedly considering three new concepts to deter tanking, with potential changes to the draft lottery rules expected to be voted on by owners in May.

items.headline: Lakers Dominate Nets Behind Doncic's 41
items.summary: LAL secured a 116-99 victory over BKN, fueled by Luka Doncic's impressive 41 points and 8 rebounds. Austin Reaves added 26 points.

items.headline: Pritchard's 36 Points Lead Celtics Over Hawks
items.summary: Payton Pritchard exploded for 36 points, complementing Jayson Tatum's 26 points and 12 rebounds, as BOS defeated ATL 109-102.

items.headline: Mavericks Snap Skid Against Trail Blazers
items.summary: Marvin Bagley III (26 pts, 9 reb) and rookie Cooper Flagg (24 pts) powered DAL to a 100-93 win over POR, ending their five-game losing streak. Deni Avdija contributed 20 points, 9 rebounds, and 6 assists for Portland.

items.headline: Duren's Double-Double Guides Pistons Past Pelicans
items.summary: Jalen Duren posted a dominant 30-point, 10-rebound, 7-assist double-double, leading DET to a 129-108 victory over NOP.

items.headline: Magic Edge Kings in High-Scoring Affair
items.summary: ORL narrowly defeated SAC 121-117. Paolo Banchero led the Magic with 30 points, 9 rebounds, and 7 assists, while DeMar DeRozan had 33 for the Kings.

items.headline: Hornets Upset Knicks, Snap Win Streak
items.summary: CHA snapped NYK's seven-game winning streak with a 114-103 upset. Kon Knueppel had 26 points, 11 rebounds, and 8 assists for the Hornets.

items.headline: Clippers Squeak Past Pacers
items.summary: The LAC secured a tight 114-113 victory over the IND.

items.headline: Cavaliers Outscore Heat in High-Flying Game
items.summary: CLE put up an impressive 149 points to beat MIA, who scored 128.

items.headline: Rockets Best Grizzlies on the Road
items.summary: HOU defeated MEM 119-109, with Kevin Durant delivering a strong double-double performance for the Rockets.

items.headline: Thunder Roll Over Bulls
items.summary: OKC continued their strong season, beating CHI 131-113.

items.headline: Raptors Down Pelicans
items.summary: TOR emerged victorious over NOP with a final score of 119-106.

items.headline: Nuggets Top Jazz in Western Conference Clash
items.summary: DEN outlasted UTA in a high-scoring contest, winning 135-129.

items.headline: Warriors Win Shootout Against Wizards
items.summary: GSW secured a narrow 131-126 victory over WAS.

items.headline: Spurs at Bucks
items.summary: The SAS will face the MIL tonight.

items.headline: Pistons at Timberwolves
items.summary: The DET will travel to face the MIN.

items.headline: 76ers at Hornets
items.summary: The PHI will take on the CHA.

items.headline: Kings at Hawks
items.summary: The SAC will visit the ATL.

items.headline: Bulls at Grizzlies
items.summary: The CHI will battle the MEM.

items.headline: Jazz at Suns
items.summary: The UTA will challenge the PHX.

items.headline: Doncic's 41-Point Masterpiece
items.statContext: Dominated in LAL win over BKN.

items.headline: Pritchard Drops Career-High 36
items.statContext: Led BOS to victory against ATL.

items.headline: Duren's Big Double-Double
items.statContext: Key to DET's win over NOP.

items.headline: Avdija's All-Around Effort
items.statContext: Strong performance for POR against DAL.

items.headline: Rookie Flagg Shines for Mavericks
items.statContext: Rookie standout in DAL's win over POR.

items.headline: Multiple Kings Starters Suffer Season-Ending Injuries
items.summary: The Sacramento Kings have been hit hard by injuries, with Domantas Sabonis (torn left meniscus), Russell Westbrook (foot irritation, no timeline), De'Andre Hunter (eye surgery), Zach LaVine (hand surgery), and Drew Eubanks (thumb surgery) all ruled out for the remainder of the season.

items.headline: Giannis Antetokounmpo Sidelined for Bucks
items.summary: Milwaukee Bucks star Giannis Antetokounmpo is out due to a left knee hyperextension and bone bruise.

items.headline: Cade Cunningham Out for Pistons with Pneumothorax
items.summary: Detroit Pistons guard Cade Cunningham is sidelined with a pneumothorax (collapsed lung).

items.headline: Western Conference Playoff Picture: Blazers Clinch Spot
items.summary: The Portland Trail Blazers, currently 9th in the Western Conference with a 37-38 record, have clinched a playoff spot. OKC (57-16) leads the conference, followed by SAS (55-18) and LAL (47-26).

items.headline: Eastern Conference Leaders: Pistons Hold Strong
items.summary: The Detroit Pistons continue to lead the Eastern Conference with a 53-20 record, with the Boston Celtics (48-24) holding the second spot.
